title: festuca rubra subsp. oelandica
intro: Festuca rubra subsp. oelandica, also known as red fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to the Baltic region. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Festuca rubra subsp. oelandica include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional remedies and natural health supplements.
